reference: Hello Doctor, my name is Nagakumar. I have a problem with my heartbeat; my heart suddenly starts beating fast and I begin sweating profusely. This subsides after some time, and during that time, my body starts shaking. Can you please tell me why this is happening?
text: Hello doctor, my name is Nargakumar. I have a problem with my heartbeat; my heart suddenly starts beating fast, and I begin sweating profusely. This subsides after some time, and during that time my body starts shaking. Can you please tell me why this is happening?
